title: Pre-release candidate consolidation and source archive hygiene
changes: Consolidated M46.1-M46.6 as a cleaner pre-release candidate.
Extended ordo repo-check with package-generated artifact hygiene checks.
Removed generated package artifacts from compiled/, reports/, runtime/, and generated_outputs/ in the source archive, leaving .gitkeep placeholders.
Updated README, CHANGELOG, docs/reports and book source Markdown only; PDF not regenerated.

source_archive_hygiene.rationale: generated evidence must be produced by the current CLI run, not carried from stale local executions

known_limitations: go-no-go is a deterministic helper and does not execute an AI model.
Rendered artifact validation checks declared contract values and mappings, not arbitrary business semantics.
Generated artifacts are excluded from the source archive but can be regenerated from package inputs.
